      Java backend developer

      Zensar Technologies
      • Posted 2 days ago
      • Over 100 applicants
      Fresher
      Bengaluru, India
      Login to check your skill match score

      Java backend developer

      Zensar Technologies
      Job Description

      Job Description:

      We are looking for a skilled Java Backend Developer with strong experience in modern Java (17+ versions) and reactive programming to design and build scalable, high-performance applications. The ideal candidate should have hands-on expertise in cloud-native development and distributed systems.

      Must-Have Skills

      • Java 17
      • Reactive Programming
      • Kubernetes/ Cassandra/ Terraform

      Key Responsibilities:

      • Design and develop scalable, reactive microservices
      • Build and maintain cloud-native applications on Kubernetes
      • Implement efficient data models and queries using Cassandra
      • Automate infrastructure provisioning using Terraform
      • Ensure system performance, reliability, and scalability
      • Collaborate with cross-functional teams for end-to-end delivery

      Good to Have:

      • Experience with Spring Boot (latest versions)
      • Exposure to CI/CD pipelines
      • Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)

      Industry: Other

      Function: Software Development

      Job Type: Permanent Job

      Looking for similar opportunities? Click here to explore more jobs like this!

      Similar Jobs
      Reactive Programming
      Java 17
      Terraform
      Cassandra
